'''Kassihm's Pirates''' were a group of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kassihm]]. A large portion of them were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Company-stub}}
